title: Neotysonia phyllostegia
taxonomy: Neotysonia phyllostegia is a species of plant that belongs to the family Phytosporellaceae. It is a type of smut fungus, which is a group of fungi that produce spores in the form of black, powdery masses. The classification of Neotysonia phyllostegia includes being a member of the order Microascales and the class Ascomycota. Within the class Ascomycota, it is further classified as a member of the division Ascomycota. This classification helps to understand the evolutionary relationships between different species of fungi.
